statements.statement: MATCH (head:Person {name: 'Ahmad Ashari'}), (wife:Person {name: 'Siti Aminah'}) MERGE (head)-[:MARRIED_TO {startDate: date('1985-01-01'), isCurrent: true, order: 1}]->(wife) RETURN head.name, wife.name

MATCH (head:Person {name: 'Ahmad Ashari'}), (wife:Person {name: 'Siti Aminah'}), (child:Person {name: 'Hanif Ashari'}) MERGE (head)-[:PARENT_OF]->(child) MERGE (wife)-[:PARENT_OF]->(child) RETURN child.name
MATCH ()-[r]->() RETURN type(r) as relationshipType, count(r) as count
